title: Manufacturing Engineer - Royal Enfield - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Royal Enfield - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Royal Enfield is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Royal Enfield:
Royal Enfield is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Royal Enfield!
